nasb.text: only in order that the generations of the sons of Israel might be taught war, those who had not experienced it formerly).

esv.text: It was only in order that the generations of the people of Israel might know war, to teach war to those who had not known it before.

cnv.text: 好使以色列人的後代，那些以前沒有經驗過這些戰爭的人，知道學習爭戰。
